scripts.dev: concurrently "PORT=3006 npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web"
scripts.dev:vyro: concurrently "PORT=3006 npm run dev --workspace=apps/api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" && sleep 4 && node open-in-vyro.mjs http://localhost:3005
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/types && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
